inbox.title: WhatsRay - Manage Inbox
inbox.body:
Connected chat ready
Messages will appear here

Welcome to your Inbox

Connect WhatsApp to start messaging

Connect a WhatsApp account to view synchronized chats, reply to contacts, and manage conversations from one place.

Set WhatsApp Two-Step Verification PIN

Create the 6-digit two-step verification PIN for this WhatsApp Business number. You will need this PIN if Meta asks you to verify or re-register the number later.

Use exactly 6 numbers. Avoid simple PINs such as 123456 or 000000.

saved_reply_create.title: WhatsRay - Create Saved Reply
saved_reply_create.body:
Create Saved Reply

Create a new saved reply.

Back
Shared replies are available to all agents. Private replies are only visible to you.
Choose one or more numbers for this saved reply.
Available in all WhatsApp numbers
Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, doc, docx, txt. Max size: 10MB per file.

When enabled, the message text will be sent as a caption on the first attachment instead of a separate message.

Preview
Your message preview will appear here

whatsapp_account.title: WhatsRay - Manage WhatsApp
whatsapp_account.body:
Manage WhatsApp

Connect and manage multiple WhatsApp Business accounts seamlessly.

No data found There are no available data to display on this table at the moment.
Set WhatsApp Two-Step Verification PIN

Create the 6-digit two-step verification PIN for this WhatsApp Business number. You will need this PIN if Meta asks you to verify or re-register the number later.

Use exactly 6 numbers. Avoid simple PINs such as 123456 or 000000.
Send Test Message

Message Sending Information

If you are using the Meta test application, you must add the recipient phone number to the Meta Dashboard as a test phone number. Messages will not be delivered in test mode unless the number is added.

If the test phone number has already been added but you are not receiving messages, try sending a message from your WhatsApp test number to the Meta app phone number first. Due to Meta spam protection, messages may sometimes be blocked initially.

Please note that these limitations apply only to test mode. In live/production mode, messages can be sent to any valid phone number without these restrictions.

Please Confirm!

development_credential.title: WhatsRay - Developer Tool
development_credential.body:
Developer Tool

This page displays your API credentials (Client ID and Client Secret) which allow you to securely access our system from external applications via API. Please keep these credentials confidential and use them to authenticate your requests. API Documentation

ip_white_list.body:

Please add your IP address to the IP whitelist in the dashboard. API access is restricted to whitelisted IPs only; requests from non-whitelisted IP addresses will be denied.

twofactor.title: WhatsRay - 2FA Security
twofactor.body:
Add Your Account
Use the QR code or setup key on your Google Authenticator app to add your account.

Google Authenticator is a multifactor app for mobile devices. It generates timed codes used during the 2-step verification process. To use Google Authenticator, install the Google Authenticator application on your mobile device. Download

Enable 2FA Security
